rows.label: tev068801_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068801_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Gu Ludho about the life of a Larsian.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068801_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068801_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Gu Ludho if she's heard any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068801_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Gu Ludho what she intends to do next.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068801_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Gu Ludho about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068801_MSG0001
rows.name:
I do not mind being sent to this
city to reinforce the humans.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068801_MSG0002
rows.name:
But this place is so strange to me. Jumbled layers
and rows of identical buildings? Roads where one
misstep sends you tumbling into some queer liquid?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068801_MSG0003
rows.name:
Recently, I even found myself lost here
in the residential district and needed
Lucia to save me. How pathetic![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068801_MSG0004
rows.name:
Much to my surprise, kind Lucia did not berate me for
my failings, but instead invited me to her domicile
and permitted me to cleanse myself in this pond.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068801_MSG0005
rows.name:
This city makes it difficult
for covert operatives to carry
out their missions...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068801_MSG0010
rows.name:
There are still great warriors who have
the faith and trust of His Highness at
our refuge in Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068801_MSG0011
rows.name:
But at the moment, we are facing a great
trial that even they cannot overcome.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068801_MSG0012
rows.name:
You BLADEs have been traveling around the
world aiding xenoforms, have you not?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068801_MSG0013
rows.name:
Should you ever find yourself in Valley of Oblivion,
I would be most relieved if you would pay my people
a visit and look into their situation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068801_MSG0018
rows.name:
I was tasked with a mission to
assassinate a certain Growth loyalist.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068801_MSG0019
rows.name:
I hunted down my quarry, but just
as I was about to deliver the
killing blow, I began to wonder.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068801_MSG0020
rows.name:
Did this man have a family?
Did he have devoted friends
like Lucia who cared for him?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068801_MSG0021
rows.name:
As these traitorous thoughts swirled in
my head, my hand wavered and I let him
escape. I am a failure as an operative.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068801_MSG0022
rows.name:
It seems that when Luxaar was
destroyed, any desire I had to
do such work died with him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068801_MSG0023
rows.name:
Lately, my mind has wandered to thoughts
of living someplace bright and working in
one of the tea shops you call "caffays."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068801_MSG0028
rows.name:
I have received a missive from
my companions back at the refuge
in Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068801_MSG0029
rows.name:
They say that a certain BLADE has visited the
refuge and settled all of the remaining
worriments that had been plaguing our people.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068801_MSG0030
rows.name:
I understand that the BLADE in
question goes by the name of [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068801_MSG0031
rows.name:
You are a BLADE yourself, are you
not? Would you happen to be acquainted
with this talented warrior?[ST:wait ]
